# Q 

2 

M 

LEATHERCLEANER STRONG

## Interior / maintenance

### Strong leather cleaner for deep cleaning and preparation.

Q²M LeatherCleaner Strong is an effective cleaner developed to remove heavy dirt, oily residue and discolouration from automotive leather. It is designed as a preparation step before applying leather coatings and leaves the surface fully matte and free of residues.

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2024/01/productmain_1700x1645px_q2m_leather-cleaner-strong_1000_500_2023-1024x991.png)

[Technical Details](#technical-details)

## Strong, effective and safe leather cleaner.

Q²M LeatherCleaner Strong provides deep cleaning where gentle maintenance products are not sufficient. It prepares leather upholstery for protective coatings without softening the surface or altering its natural feel.

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/benefiticons54.svg)

QUICK AND EFFECTIVE 

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/benefiticons15.svg)

REMOVES DIRT AND STAINS 

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/benefiticons73.svg)

STRONG CLEANING ACTION 

## TECHNICAL DETAILS

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/860x640q2mleathercleanerstrong.webp)

CAPACITIES 

500 ML / 1000 ML

Consumption

100ml/car

## HOW TO USE

Q 

2 

M 

LEATHERCLEANER STRONG

01
Apply Q²M LeatherCleaner Strong to a leather brush or pad. 

02
Work the product into the leather surface gently. 

03
Wipe away loosened contamination with a microfibre towel. 

04
Repeat on heavily soiled areas if needed. 

05
Proceed with leather protection after cleaning. 

### Watch
product
video

## FREQUENTLY ASKED
QUESTIONS

01
When should Q²M LeatherCleaner Strong be used? 

When leather is heavily soiled or before coating application.

02
Does it leave residue on the leather? 

No. It leaves a clean, matte surface.

03
Is it safe for modern automotive leather? 

Yes. It is designed for modern leather upholstery.

04
Can it be used on coated leather? 

Yes. It cleans without removing coatings.

05
Is it suitable for regular maintenance? 

It is intended for deeper cleaning rather than daily use.

[FIND MORE ANSWERS](https://gyeon.zendesk.com/hc/en-us/sections/360000250677-Q-M-Leather-Cleaner-Strong)

## Recommended Pairing

We recommend complementary products that perfectly match your current one, creating a complete and convenient KIT. Together, they deliver the best performance and a seamless user experience.
